examples: Is "seance" a musical theater work with operatic elements?
Some evenings I would join the girls in a table-turning seance.
For 10 years his wife held a seance on Halloween; Houdini never turned up.
Dr May ignores Jackie sitting opposite him and addresses the voices in her head directly, a little like he is invoking spirits at a seance.
The story opens with Hall's character, Florence Cathcart, at a seance.
